name: PROSPECT CAPITAL CORP
business: Prospect Capital Corporation is a financial services company that primarily lends to and invests in middle market privately-held companies. It is a closed-end investment company regulated as a business development company. Its investment objective is to generate both current income and long-term capital appreciation by investing in senior and secured loans and equity-linked investments.

exposures.sentence: CP Energy provides oilfield flow back services and fluid hauling and disposal services through its subsidiaries.
NPRC acquires real estate assets, including, but not limited to, industrial, commercial, and multi-family properties, self-storage, and student housing properties.
With respect to our online consumer and SME lending initiative, we invest primarily in marketplace loans through marketplace lending platforms.
Pacific World supplies nail and beauty care products to food, drug, mass, and value retail channels worldwide.
Valley Electric Company, Inc... leading providers of specialty electrical services in the states of Washington and California.
We historically invested in structured credit (primarily equity tranches).
InterDent is a dental support organization (DSO). InterDent provides business and administrative support services to a regionally-diversified set of dental practices.
